rtui 0.0.1
  • Reference
    • Reactivity reference

Create an event-driven reactive expression

tuiReactiveEvent.Rd

Creates a reactive object that updates only when event is triggered.

Usage

tuiReactiveEvent(event, expr, runAtInit = FALSE)

Arguments

event

An input$<id> / input[["id"]] reference, or a reactive call/object from tuiReactive(), tuiReactiveVal(), or tuiReactiveEvent().

expr

An expression evaluated when event triggers.

runAtInit

A single logical value. If TRUE, evaluate once during app initialization.

Value

A reactive object (function) to be called with ().
